examples.en: She left early so that she could catch the train.

blank.after: that she could catch the train.

data.title: lest
data.ja: 「〜しないように」= lest + should/原形。

examples.en: He whispered lest he should wake the baby.
examples.ja: 「〜しないように」= lest + should/原形。

blank.ja: 「〜しないように」= lest + should/原形。

data.title: were to (hypothetical)
data.ja: 「万が一〜したら」= if + 主語 + were to。

examples.en: If I were to lose my job, I'd move abroad.
examples.ja: 「万が一〜したら」= if + 主語 + were to。

blank.after: to lose my job, I'd move abroad.
blank.ja: 「万が一〜したら」= if + 主語 + were to。

explain.why: If + were to で万が一の仮定。

data.title: not until
data.ja: 「〜して初めて」= Not until + 倒置。

examples.en: Not until she left did I realize my mistake.
examples.ja: 「〜して初めて」= Not until + 倒置。

blank.ja: 「〜して初めて」= Not until + 倒置。

examples.en: Scarcely had he sat down when the bell rang.
It is no use worrying about the past.
